_Notice: Copy this file to appsettings.json and fill in real values before running.

FeatureFlags._Comment_EnableEntraIdAuth: Set to true to use Azure Entra ID (OIDC) for admin login instead of local PBKDF2 credentials. Requires network access to the Entra tenant.
FeatureFlags._Comment_EnableIndexTxtWatch: Set to true to automatically re-import index.txt whenever it changes on disk. Requires Ingestion.IndexTxtWatchPath to be configured.

OcspServer._Comment_PfxPath: Path to a PKCS#12 (.pfx) file bundling the OCSP signing cert and key. When set, takes priority over the PEM paths below.
OcspServer._Comment_PfxPassword: Password protecting the .pfx, or null for unprotected. Store in user secrets, not here.
OcspServer._Comment_ResponderCertPath: PEM certificate for the OCSP signing identity issued by the offline CA (used when PfxPath is null)
OcspServer._Comment_SigningKeyPath: PEM private key for the OCSP signing identity (used when PfxPath is null)
OcspServer._Comment_SigningKeyPassword: Passphrase for encrypted key, or null/omit for unencrypted
OcspServer._Comment_NextUpdateHours: Clients must not cache responses past thisUpdate + NextUpdateHours

AdminAuth._Comment: Used only when FeatureFlags.EnableAdminAuth is true and EnableEntraIdAuth is false.
AdminAuth._Comment_AdminPasswordHash: Generate with: dotnet run -- hash-password  Format: iterations:base64salt:base64hash

_Comment_AzureAd: Used only when FeatureFlags.EnableEntraIdAuth is true.

AzureAd._Comment_ClientSecret: Store in user secrets or environment variables, not here.
AzureAd._Comment_AdminGroupId: Entra security group object ID whose members are granted admin access. Null = any authenticated Entra user.

Ingestion._Comment_IndexTxtWatchPath: Path to OpenSSL CA index.txt. Required when EnableIndexTxtWatch is true.
Ingestion._Comment_PollingIntervalMinutes: 0 = file-watcher only; set > 0 to also poll on a schedule
Ingestion._Comment_LocalOcspResponderUrl: Base URL of a local OpenSSL OCSP responder for live delta sync, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:2560
